channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Zero-downtime migrations: what works and what wastes
item.description: Cut zero-downtime migration risk 78% with dual writes and pg_cron — lock time benchmarks, rollback scripts, and the 15% disk trade-off most teams ignore.

item.title: 7 patterns for systems that won’t die when networks
item.description: Why this list exists (what I was actually trying to solve) I spent three weeks debugging a ‘random’ failure in a payment service that only happened when…

item.title: Airflow’s replacement: what 80% of teams moved to in
item.description: Cut pipeline overhead 95%: how 80% of teams replaced Airflow in 2026 with Kubernetes-native workflows, sub-second latency, and $58/month Postgres.

item.title: Frontend testing 2026: 3 tools I trust
item.description: Cut frontend test time 70% in 2026 with Playwright 1.44 and Vitest 1.6 — real CI speeds, flake rates, and the Cypress mistake I won’t repeat

item.title: AI won’t fix your legacy code — but my script did
item.description: Reduce legacy maintenance fear 40% with a $12/month local LLM system — AST parsing, Redis graph, and grounded inference on Python 2.7 codebases in 2026

item.title: Maintain 40% AI code: test first, lint always
item.description: Cut test time 80% while catching AI bugs — Jest vs Codium in 2026. Compare deterministic vs probabilistic guardrails for teams where 40% of code is AI-written.

item.title: Claude 4 prompts broke my prod
item.description: Cut prompt rejection 90% by avoiding imperative questions — Claude 4 and GPT-5 tone filters block direct commands, not just bad content

item.title: Stop burning cash on multi-region backends
item.description: A SaaS product with 80% of users in APAC sees 5x more writes to the eu-west-1 region than us-east-1, yet eu-west-1’s database is only 12% larger.

item.title: Zero-trust on $0 budget: Cloudflare vs Tailscale
item.description: Cut per-seat cloud costs 95% with Tailscale’s WireGuard mesh instead of Cloudflare Zero Trust — ACLs in Git, 1–3 ms latency, and $5/month total for 20 devices.

item.title: Compare Kafka, Redpanda, NATS for event-driven systems
item.description: Pick the right event broker in 2026: Kafka vs Redpanda vs NATS with concrete benchmarks, tuning steps, and cost figures to cut latency and avoid message loss.

item.title: Skip M-Pesa: build one API for 3 African markets
item.description: Cut payment integration work 60% with one API for Kenya, Nigeria, Ghana — latency benchmarks, sandbox pitfalls, and the adapter strategy most teams miss

item.title: Why AI interviewers failed 68% of us in 2026
item.description: AI interviewers reject 68% of candidates in 2026 — here’s the real reason and how to fix it in 30 minutes: rediscover Redis and PostgreSQL, beat the keyword trap, and game the system ethically.

item.title: PR checklists are dead: AI agents do reviews now
item.description: Cut PR review time 70% with agentic pipelines — 90s latency, $0.0012 cost, and 42% fewer escapes — without rewriting your stack.

item.title: Make offline apps work when the network dies
item.description: Cut data loss 99% and sync latency 62% with SQLite, UUID v7, and a power-aware queue — the real offline-first stack for unreliable networks in 2026.

item.title: Why AI monitoring fails traditional tools
item.description: Cut AI hallucinations 74% with observability — prompt drift, context changes, and agent decisions you can’t see with traditional logs. 2026 metrics from a live system.

item.title: Cut origin load 80% with Workers
item.description: Cut origin load 80% with Cloudflare Workers — cache static assets, read-only API responses, and measure p95 latency drops from 412 ms to 89 ms while saving 42% on AWS bills.

item.title: TypeScript 5.3 changed how we model domains
item.description: Cut domain layer lines 75% with TypeScript 5.3 — branded types, template literal rules, and the `satisfies` operator that caught 100% of validation errors at compile time.

item.title: Custom agents beat frameworks in 2026
item.description: Custom agents beat frameworks in 2026 — latency, cost, and error-rate data from Nigerian 3G systems shows why CrewAI and LangGraph fail under partial failures and how a Redis-backed orchestrator handles them.

item.title: Small model fine-tuning wins in 2026
item.description: Cut LLM costs 75% in 2026 by fine-tuning 7B models — real latency, security, and cost numbers from a live system serving 500k daily requests.

item.title: Agentic coding’s year in prod: Claude Code’s wins
item.description: Cut PR review time 95% with Claude Code in 2026 — exact workspace config, policies, and audit trail that passed a GDPR audit. Learn what actually works after a year of daily use.
